name: Sofia Hnatiuk
description: Sofia prepares espresso, latte, cappuccino, and seasonal drinks while helping guests choose coffee for their mood.
tips: Ask Sofia what coffee works best with dessert or which seasonal drink is worth trying today.
body: Sofia brings the cafe part of Wake Cup to life through coffee, small conversations, and drink recommendations.
Her role is public because many guests interact directly with the barista during quick visits, takeaway orders, or afternoon coffee breaks.
A barista profile helps guests see that specialty coffee has real people and real care behind it.
highlights: Prepares espresso, latte, cappuccino, and tea

name: Maksym Petrenko
description: Maksym prepares pastries and seasonal cafe items that pair naturally with Wake Cup coffee.
tips: Ask Maksym what came fresh today or which pastry works best with your coffee.
body: Maksym represents the pastry and kitchen side of Wake Cup in a public-facing way.
He supports seasonal dessert ideas, pastry boxes, and small cafe treats that make coffee breaks more memorable.
His profile helps guests understand that the pastry counter has a real team behind it.

name: Andrii Melnyk
description: Andrii guides the cafe service flow, helps guests choose from the menu, and keeps table service smooth during busy hours.
tips: Ask Andrii for table timing, takeaway options, or simple menu pairing advice.
body: Andrii keeps service attentive without making it feel heavy.
He supports the team during morning coffee, lunch breaks, and afternoon pastry service.
His public profile is useful for showing that cafe service is also about care, timing, and calm communication.
highlights: Helps guests choose from the menu
Supports table service for small groups
